summary: Tested MV (Minimum Value) compliance fix. Bug was that MV check was incorrectly passing plans where employer contribution was far below 60% of total premium. Fix verified: MV now requires BOTH actuarial value >= 60% AND employer contribution >= 60% of total premium. All backend tests pass (7/7). Frontend UI correctly shows MV fail badges and compliance popup with separate Actuarial Value and Employer Contribution checks.
passed_tests: Backend: Platinum PPO MV check FAILS (mv=90%, er_contrib=0.8% < 60%)
Backend: Silver PPO MV check PASSES (mv=62%, er_contrib=77.8%)
Backend: Gold HMO MV check PASSES (mv=78%, er_contrib=80.2%)
Backend: Bronze HDHP MV check PASSES (mv=89%, er_contrib=78.1%)
Backend: Standard EPO MV check PASSES (mv=68%, er_contrib=81%)
Backend: MV response includes new fields (employer_contribution_pct, employer_contribution_pass, actuarial_pass)
Backend: Compliance response structure is correct
Frontend: Plan Library shows MV fail badge 'MV 90% (ER 1% — Fail)' for Platinum PPO
Frontend: Compliance popup shows Actuarial Value check (Pass) and Employer Contribution check (Fail — Below 60%) separately
Frontend: Compliance popup shows employer contribution as '0.8% of premium'
Frontend: Silver PPO compliance popup shows all Pass indicators
Frontend: Assign button appears disabled/grayed for Platinum PPO (MV fails)
Frontend: Employee Portal MV badge code correctly implements dual check (actuarial >= 60% AND er_contrib >= 60%)
critical_code_review_comments: MV check correctly updated in 3 locations: compliance-check endpoint (line 417-419), offer code calculation (line 70), and eligibility engine (line 717)
Frontend PlanLibraryPage.js correctly calculates ER contribution percentage and shows appropriate fail badges
Frontend compliance popup correctly displays both Actuarial Value and Employer Contribution checks separately
EmployeePortalPage.js MV badge logic updated in both enrolled view (line 360) and plan selection view (line 679)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all MV badge and compliance popup features working)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing plans: Platinum PPO (id: 16739425-5a63-45d9-9fde-418724747016), Silver PPO (id: ac820c3c-4409-4818-82c5-55c8ba523ce9), Gold HMO (id: bc701f0b-29c4-4f37-ab42-ebb4f5fad085), Bronze HDHP (id: 46ef441c-ab24-4a2d-a583-79f29ada5dcf), Standard EPO (id: 70cb740e-d7c1-4798-8ddc-035bfe79bbd5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MV compliance fix verified. Key test data: Platinum PPO (mv=90%, er_contrib=$6/$750=0.8%) correctly FAILS MV due to low employer contribution. Other plans (Silver PPO, Gold HMO, Bronze HDHP, Standard EPO) all PASS MV with employer contributions >= 60%. The compliance check endpoint POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/compliance-check returns new fields: employer_contribution_pct, employer_contribution_pass, actuarial_pass. Frontend correctly displays these in compliance popup and plan card badges.

verified_fix_details.bug_description: MV check was incorrectly passing plans where employer contribution was far below 60% of total premium
verified_fix_details.fix_applied: MV now requires BOTH actuarial value >= 60% AND employer contribution >= 60% of total self-only premium
